creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: What FreeBSD version are you running? It is not reproducible neither on stable/13 nor on 14-CURRENT. SSH was updated to OpenSSH_8.8p1 in CURRENT and 1{2,3}-STABLE.  Setting "KbdInteractiveAuthentication no" disables password authentication completely in all these branches.
